description: User waits while the 'All Set!' loading overlay is displayed, indicating the flight selection is being processed.
frame_description: A loading overlay with the text 'All Set! Now let's review your flight selections...' is visible over the dimmed flight results page.

description: The page navigates to the baggage selection and trip review section, as seen by the URL change to #baggage.
User dwells on the 'Review trip' page, likely examining the flight itinerary and the total price summary.
frame_description: The 'Review trip' page is fully loaded, displaying departing and returning flight details, price summary, and available add-ons like baggage and seats.
